title: Update API keys description in README.
author: morriszdweck
pr_body_excerpt: updated API keys descirption to get rid of the old deprecated publishable keys, added app keys, and also changed GPT-5 to just GPT as the other names in the same sentence were also general

gist.headline: Key Documentation
gist.blurb: Tidied up the README to reflect our current API key structure. Out with the old publishable keys, in with the new app keys!
gist.summary: Updated the README to remove deprecated publishable keys, introduce app keys, and generalize model references like GPT.
gist.impact: Developers reading the documentation will see accurate, up-to-date information about how to authenticate with app keys.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing documents or reading a large pixelated book/scroll with a glowing key (representing API keys) nearby.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing a stack of digital documents and a glowing golden key. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing a stack of digital documents and a glowing golden key. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic.
